description_long: This is a round, bulbous ceramic cup with a smooth, glossy finish and a wide opening. The exterior is primarily white, adorned with colorful cartoon-style animal characters, including a dog, bear, and other whimsical figures, giving it a playful and decorative appearance. The interior and handle are a solid blue, contrasting with the white exterior. The handle is robust and ergonomically shaped, attached at the side for easy gripping. The cup lacks a lid and has no visible branding or text, focusing instead on its artistic motif. Its overall form is sturdy and functional, suitable for holding hot or cold beverages.
description: A round, white ceramic cup with a blue interior and handle, decorated with colorful cartoon animal artwork. It has a glossy finish and a playful, decorative appearance.
description_view_0: This view shows the cup's blue interior and handle, with part of a cartoon bear and other characters visible on the left side.
description_view_1: The handle is centered in this view, and a cartoon dog with a yellow flower is prominently displayed on the right side of the cup.
description_view_2: This angle highlights the cup's wide opening, the blue handle on the left, and a group of cartoon animals, including a dog and a bear, on the front.
description_view_3: The cup's opening is fully visible, with a cluster of cartoon animals, including a dog and a bear, wrapping around the front and right side.
